prompt: pesquisa profunda sobre beta-bloqueadores na prevencao primaria de sangramento varicoso --queries "SCite: PREDESCI nonselective beta-blockers, Consensus: beta-blockers portal hypertension"

assertions.text: Report opens with a prose narrative summary (5-10 lines) that a professor can read in 60 seconds
Report contains at least 1 specific actionable recommendation
Report contains findings from at least 2 distinct search legs
Report includes a comparative table with an 'implication' column
Report interprets convergences in prose, not just counts
Report contains at least 3 PMIDs or DOIs with verification status
Report includes concrete effect sizes with confidence intervals
Report does NOT contain vague claims without specific citation
